leadershipRequirements: Ownership mindset — treats product like own
Technical DNA setter — establish engineering standards
Culture champion for quality and execution
summary: Founding Engineer role at The Flex, a remote-first PropTech startup building the operating system for modern renting. The company integrates with Airbnb, Stripe, Hostaway, and Twilio on their Base360.ai-powered platform. This high-ownership role involves building core systems from zero (bookings, payments, availability, guest experience), owning the full stack, and establishing technical foundations. Requires strong full-stack or backend-heavy experience, AWS/FastAPI/React proficiency, and an ownership-first mindset.

prioritySignals.reason: Core differentiator of role — engineers make architectural decisions that shape company for years, not just implement features.
Explicit requirement to build across web apps, APIs, and cloud infrastructure with comfort across the stack.
Specific technology stack mentioned as preferred — FastAPI (backend), React (frontend), AWS (infrastructure).
Cultural fit signal — company values speed and pragmatism over lengthy planning processes.

prioritySignals.signal: High ambiguity tolerance and changing requirements
prioritySignals.reason: Role operates in dynamic startup environment with evolving requirements — comfort with uncertainty is essential.
Specific platform integrations mentioned — real-world API integration skills needed, though not explicitly required.
Core technical requirement — automating manual business processes using event-driven workflows from day one.
